description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named 'CMake (Windows using VCPKG)' that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main, ignoring certain paths. The workflow should use a Windows 2022 environment with a matrix strategy to build with different tool versions, build types, architectures, and shared library settings. Install Ninja, set up the MSVC development environment, configure VCPKG, and then configure and build a CMake project.
